title: Fantaz's Minecraft++
description: A combination of Serilum's The Vanilla Experience and DB's Minecraft Plus modpacks.
body:
# A collection of mods that enhances every aspect of Minecraft, while keeping the vanilla feel.
Over 180 mods! Including:
- UI Changes
- QoL Changes
- New Biomes
- New Mobs
- New Mechanics
- Animated & 3D Textures
- Shaders Support
- Optimizations Mods
- Voice Chat Support

Credits:

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)
